set(NET_SOURCES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/LibCoroHttpClient.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Api.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/TelegramException.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/WebhookService.cpp
